recent: S11-S1 (2026-07-02, commit e8c18f4a): BUILT the PLG-S staging harness env + driver + relay-staging skill. Extracted the launch/CLI primitives from npx-prod-smoke.mjs into scripts/lib/harness.mjs (shared by smoke + driver, can't drift; smoke -128 dup lines, Cases A/B/L/C still green). scripts/staging.mjs: setup (npm pack→install into persistent ~/relay-staging/run/), launch (detached hold-open on :3199 against ~/.relay-staging + RELAY_STAGING=true + file:// mirror; readiness poll to HTTP 200 + fresh-customer fidelity assert), status, teardown (wipe + R4 isolation assert). RELAY_STAGING gate was already shipped — no gate code. relay-staging SKILL.md (.claude/skills/, gitignored) = the S2-S4 substrate (Setup/Launch/Teardown/Scenario modes, R1-R5 invariants, bug-found tree). VERIFICATION CAUGHT A LATENT BUG: first R4 impl checked ~/.relay/relay.db mtime and false-positived — the installed CLI's boot-time migrateLegacyData() opens the default DB unconditionally + a concurrent operator dev server touches it, both bumping mtime without a staging write. Traced via lsof (staging server holds ONLY ~/.relay-staging handles) + sha256 (content byte-identical) → hardened R4 to content hash. E2e verified: :3199 up, seed/clear 200 under RELAY_STAGING, Community/production banner, ~/.relay untouched, teardown wipes clean, smoke green post-extraction. Memory: staging-isolation-check-content-not-mtime

S10 (2026-07-02): shipped both P2 fixes + groomed PLG-4 to empty. fix-anthropic-direct-task-serialization — root cause: withAnthropicDirectMcpServers merges the in-process `relay` server (createToolServer().asMcpServer(), a circular SDK object with a `root` back-ref, minified 'HJ') into params.mcp_servers verbatim; the Messages API mcp_servers is for REMOTE URL connectors and the SDK JSON.stringifies the body → crash before the model call on EVERY task. Relay tools already served locally via forProvider('anthropic')+executeHandler, so injection was crashing AND redundant. Fix: mcpServersToAnthropicConnectors projects the merge to the URL-connector shape (skips relay + local stdio), mirrors openai-direct's mcpServersToOpenAiTools. Regression test builds the exact cycle; real dev-server anthropic-direct task now completes (result 'ok'). fix-inbox-checkpoint-realtime — InboxList+UnreadBadge polled 10s, never subscribed to a stream, so HITL checkpoints surfaced ~10-15s late; both now subscribe to the existing /api/notifications/pending-approvals/stream (~750ms tail, carries WorkflowCheckpoint rows) as an invalidation trigger and re-pull the authoritative list — /api/notifications stays the single render source, poll kept as fallback. 741ms insert→emit smoke. 51/51 runtime+notifications tests pass. Commits 705d095a/1b10404e/891e759b. Memory: anthropic-direct-mcp-servers-remote-only

S9 sweep (2026-07-02): stagent→ainative→relay legacy-symbol audit (2540 ainative + 250 stagent hits, categorized). Fixed 3 LIVE divergence bugs where tooling/boot-migration read the orphaned ~/.ainative DB while the app reads ~/.relay: (1) migrateLegacyData() was a one-hop stagent→ainative migrator stranding data at a dir the app ignores — now a chained MIGRATION_CHAIN ~/.stagent→~/.ainative→~/.relay; (2)(3) drizzle.config.ts + backfill-row-key-normalization.ts repointed AINATIVE_DATA_DIR||~/.ainative → RELAY_DATA_DIR||~/.relay + relay.db, matching env.ts 'RELAY_* only' policy. Fixed stale governance docs (dead Developer/ainative path → orionfold/relay, brand prose, ~/.ainative comments). Kept load-bearing legacy strings (shim internals, enum values, $AINATIVE_DATA_DIR manifest placeholder, live ainative-business npm pkg, getAinative* delegators). 16 migration tests green, tsc clean, dev boot smoke HTTP 200 against real ~/.relay/relay.db. Commit d6693d55. Memory: legacy-rebrand-divergence-bugs
